overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character leading a horse through a dense forest at night, illuminated by a handheld lantern. The third-person camera follows steadily as they navigate a dirt trail, cross a shallow river, and continue into the woodland.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest trail approaching river

events.description: river becomes visible through the trees ahead in the distance

agents.ego_description: leading a horse by the reins along a narrow forest trail, holding a lantern to illuminate the path

notable_agents.action: horse being led by the character, walking steadily behind on a lead rope

entered.detail: tall pine trees flanking both sides of the trail, dark silhouettes against night sky
narrow dirt path winding through the forest, illuminated by lantern light
rustic wooden fence running parallel to the trail on the right side
large rock formation visible through the trees on the left

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a dense pine forest at night, holding a lantern that casts a warm glow on the dirt trail ahead. A horse follows closely behind on a lead rope as they navigate the winding path, approaching a river that becomes visible through the trees in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow river crossing with rocky bed

events.description: character steps from riverbank into the shallow river water
character exits the river onto the opposite forest bank

agents.ego_description: carefully leading the horse through the shallow river, water splashing around their boots

notable_agents.action: horse cautiously walking through the river water, following the character's lead

entered.detail: shallow flowing river with visible current and rocky bottom, reflecting the lantern light
rocky shoreline and boulders lining the edges of the river

segments.scene_description: The character and horse enter a shallow river, the lantern light reflecting off the rippling water surface. They wade carefully across the rocky stream bed from one bank to the other, surrounded by the dark forest on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail continuing from river into woodland

agents.ego_description: continuing along the forest path away from the river, maintaining a steady pace while leading the horse

notable_agents.action: horse following closely on the lead, occasionally shaking water from its coat

entered.detail: continuation of the dirt path on the far side of the river, leading deeper into the forest
open grassy areas between clusters of pine trees alongside the trail

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the river, the character and horse continue along the winding dirt trail deeper into the dark forest. The path leads through grassy clearings between dense stands of pine trees, moving away from the water into the woodland interior.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dark pine forest as a character leads a horse from a winding trail across a river and back into the woodland interior. It begins on a dirt path where a handheld lantern casts a warm glow against the surrounding dense trees, guiding the pair toward a distant glimmer of water. As the character reaches the river, the scene shifts to a crossing of the shallow, rocky stream bed, with the lantern light reflecting off the rippling surface. The camera then follows them as they emerge from the water and return to the dirt trail, moving through grassy clearings between stands of pine. Finally, the path winds deeper into the dark forest, leaving the river behind as they venture further into the woodland.
